revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|icononly=on|Module:Toolbar}} {{Used in system}} This template is used to create a toolbar of links that are laid out in the same way as those produced by the core MediaWiki software. == Usage == {{Toolbar |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} → {{toolbar |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}}
There is a ''separator'' parameter that can be used to specify the [[Delimiter|separator character]] placed between each link:
{{Toolbar|separator=comma |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} → {{Toolbar|separator=comma |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} The separators available are: : comma{{int:comma-separator}}comma : dot{{int:dot-separator}}dot : tpt-languages{{int:tpt-languages-separator}}tpt-languages : pipe{{int:pipe-separator}}pipe ('''''default''''') The parameters ''class'' and ''style'' (specifying HTML/CSS class and styling) may also be set. == See also == * [[Module:Toolbar]], the [[Help:Lua|Lua module]] that generates this template. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Username internal link templates| ]] [[Category:Link templates|Toolbar]] [[Category:List formatting and function templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|icononly=on|Module:Toolbar}} {{Used in system}} This template is used to create a toolbar of links that are laid out in the same way as those produced by the core MediaWiki software. == Usage == {{Toolbar |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} → {{toolbar |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}}
There is a ''separator'' parameter that can be used to specify the [[Delimiter|separator character]] placed between each link:
{{Toolbar|separator=comma |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} → {{Toolbar|separator=comma |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} The separators available are: : comma{{int:comma-separator}}comma : dot{{int:dot-separator}}dot : tpt-languages{{int:tpt-languages-separator}}tpt-languages : pipe{{int:pipe-separator}}pipe ('''''default''''') The parameters ''class'' and ''style'' (specifying HTML/CSS class and styling) may also be set. == See also == * [[Module:Toolbar]], the [[Help:Lua|Lua module]] that generates this template. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Username internal link templates| ]] [[Category:Link templates|Toolbar]] [[Category:List formatting and function templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|icononly=on|Module:Toolbar}} {{Used in system}} This template is used to create a toolbar of links that are laid out in the same way as those produced by the core MediaWiki software. == Usage == {{Toolbar |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} → {{toolbar |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}}
There is a ''separator'' parameter that can be used to specify the [[Delimiter|separator character]] placed between each link:
{{Toolbar|separator=comma |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} → {{Toolbar|separator=comma |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} The separators available are: : comma{{int:comma-separator}}comma : dot{{int:dot-separator}}dot : tpt-languages{{int:tpt-languages-separator}}tpt-languages : pipe{{int:pipe-separator}}pipe ('''''default''''') The parameters ''class'' and ''style'' (specifying HTML/CSS class and styling) may also be set. == See also == * [[Module:Toolbar]], the [[Help:Lua|Lua module]] that generates this template. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Username internal link templates| ]] [[Category:Link templates|Toolbar]] [[Category:List formatting and function templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|icononly=on|Module:Toolbar}} {{Used in system}} This template is used to create a toolbar of links that are laid out in the same way as those produced by the core MediaWiki software. == Usage == {{Toolbar |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} → {{toolbar |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}}
There is a ''separator'' parameter that can be used to specify the [[Delimiter|separator character]] placed between each link:
{{Toolbar|separator=comma |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} → {{Toolbar|separator=comma |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} The separators available are: : comma{{int:comma-separator}}comma : dot{{int:dot-separator}}dot : tpt-languages{{int:tpt-languages-separator}}tpt-languages : pipe{{int:pipe-separator}}pipe ('''''default''''') The parameters ''class'' and ''style'' (specifying HTML/CSS class and styling) may also be set. == See also == * [[Module:Toolbar]], the [[Help:Lua|Lua module]] that generates this template. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Username internal link templates| ]] [[Category:Link templates|Toolbar]] [[Category:List formatting and function templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23630749988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|icononly=on|Module:Toolbar}} {{Used in system}} This template is used to create a toolbar of links that are laid out in the same way as those produced by the core MediaWiki software. == Usage == {{Toolbar |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} → {{toolbar |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}}
There is a ''separator'' parameter that can be used to specify the [[Delimiter|separator character]] placed between each link:
{{Toolbar|separator=comma |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} → {{Toolbar|separator=comma |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} The separators available are: : comma{{int:comma-separator}}comma : dot{{int:dot-separator}}dot : tpt-languages{{int:tpt-languages-separator}}tpt-languages : pipe{{int:pipe-separator}}pipe ('''''default''''') The parameters ''class'' and ''style'' (specifying HTML/CSS class and styling) may also be set. == See also == * [[Module:Toolbar]], the [[Help:Lua|Lua module]] that generates this template. {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Username internal link templates| ]] [[Category:Link templates|Toolbar]] [[Category:List formatting and function templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|icononly=on|Module:Toolbar}} {{Used in system}} This template is used to create a toolbar of links that are laid out in the same way as those produced by the core MediaWiki software. == Usage == {{Toolbar |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} → {{toolbar |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}}
There is a ''separator'' parameter that can be used to specify the [[Delimiter|separator character]] placed between each link:
{{Toolbar|separator=comma |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} → {{Toolbar|separator=comma |[[User:Example|user]] |[[User talk:Example|talk]] |[[Special:BlockIP/Example|block]]}} The separators available are: : comma{{int:comma-separator}}comma : dot{{int:dot-separator}}dot : tpt-languages{{int:tpt-languages-separator}}tpt-languages : pipe{{int:pipe-separator}}pipe ('''''default''''') The parameters ''class'' and ''style'' (specifying HTML/CSS class and styling) may also be set. == See also == * [[Module:Toolbar]], the [[Help:Lua|Lua module]] that generates this template. {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Username internal link templates| ]] [[Category:Link templates|Toolbar]] [[Category:List formatting and function templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
